chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-395 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 1591/2026 For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. 1592/2026 For hearing of main case 03.03.2026 Mr. Aijaz Hussain Jatoi, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----------- Urgency granted Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner is owner of agricultural land admeasuring 12-00 acres out of NA-Survey No,51 of Deh Mulus, Tapa Bada Taluka Kotri District Jamshoro and has approached the Revenue Authorities i.e. Director, Settlement Survey and Land Record Sindh, Deputy Commissioner, Assistant Commissioner and Mukhtiarkar Kotri for the demarcation of the land; however, it has not yet been conducted. Counsel has referred to the Application at pages 75 to 79 and corresponding letter available at pages 51 to 73. Learned AAG present in Court in other cases waives notice and submits that under Notification dated 21.10.2024 issued by the Government of Sindh, Revenue Department, a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” has been established under the supervision of concerned Deputy Commissioner and if the Petitioner approaches the Deputy Commissioner by filing a complaint, that shall be decided in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner will approach the Public Grievance Redressal Cell under the Supervision of Deputy Commissioner Jamshoro within three days. If such complaint / application is filed by the Petitioner, the same shall be decided within one month from the date of its receipt strictly in accordance with law after providing the opportunity to the party(ies) concerned.

Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner will approach the Public Grievance Redressal Cell under the Supervision of Deputy Commissioner Jamshoro within three days. If such complaint / application is filed by the Petitioner, the same shall be decided within one month from the date of its receipt strictly in accordance with law after providing the opportunity to the party(ies) concerned. Office is directed to communicate this order to the office of Deputy Commissioner Jamshoro for information and compliance Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with pending Application(s) JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
